message:
The other day, as I was prepping for the possibility of a winter storm, I found myself rummaging through old board games and puzzles that had been gathering dust. With the forecast predicting heavy snowfall, I thought, why not embrace the cozy vibe? 

As the first flakes began to fall, my family and I settled in for a game night, laughing and reminiscing over our favorite childhood games. It felt so wonderful to disconnect from screens and rediscover the joy of low-tech fun. 

In that moment, I realized that being prepared doesn’t just mean having supplies on hand; it’s also about making the most of our time together when the weather keeps us indoors. Plus, a few snacks and some friendly competition never hurt! 

How do you like to keep the fun alive during stormy weather? This little refresher helped me remember the simple joys of home!
